title: sphaerostephanos sumatrensis
intro: Sphaerostephanos sumatrensis, also known as the Sumatran fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryniaceae. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Sphaerostephanos sumatrensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. Traditionally, it is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tonics, or used in combination with other herbs in folk medicine.
